goals: Understand the potential cost savings from switching to local search
Set up QMD local search for the workspace
Search for information about mainstream blockbuster films using the local search

user_agent_config.personality: Detail-oriented and cost-conscious. Prefers data-driven decisions and values efficiency. Speaks directly about numbers and practical outcomes.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows about API costs and memory search expenses from professional experience. Not familiar with local search tools or vector embeddings. Enjoys mainstream blockbuster films in personal time.

end_condition: The accountant has calculated potential savings, set up the local search system, and successfully searched for film-related content using the new tool.
